forecasts.detailed: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could be severe. Partly sunny, with a high near 72. Southeast wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

Showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 70. South wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
